name: Crayola Erasable Colored Pencils (24ct), Kids Coloring Pencils for Coloring Books, Assorted Colors, Arts & Crafts Supplies, Gifts, Ages 6, 7, 8
bullets: CRAYOLA ERASABLE COLORED PENCILS: Includes 24 Erasable Crayola Colored Pencils in a resealable box.
VIBRANT COLORS: Explore a palette of 24 rich, vibrant colors that bring artwork to life.
ERASES EASILY: Create artwork without worry using erasable pencils that effortlessly undo mistakes.
PRESHARPENED & READY TO USE: Jump right into creative endeavors with colored pencils that are pre-sharpened and ready to use right out of the box.
SMOOTH AND PRECISE: Each pencil glides smoothly on paper, allowing for detailed and precise coloring.
HOLIDAY GIFT FOR KIDS: Perfect for Christmas, Hanukkah, and other festive celebrations, Crayola toys and art supplies make fantastic holiday gifts and stocking stuffers for boys and girls.
description: Get ready to color your world with Crayola Erasable Colored Pencils! This nifty set features 24 erasable colored pencils, all snug in a resealable box that’s as ready for adventure as you are. Step into a world of 24 rich, vibrant colors that are just waiting to bring your artwork to life. Each pencil is pre-sharpened and raring to go, right out of the box. Worried about coloring outside the lines? Pfft, no worries! These pencils erase like a dream, so feel free to let your imagination run wild. With their smooth glide on paper, you can achieve detailed and precise coloring that would make any

reviews.name: Roland Yelton Jr
reviews.title: A decent price for the quality
reviews.body: Crayola is my favorite brand of art supplies and when I can pay the extra money I prefer to buy this brand . Crazy art is my second and I'm not picky if it works I'll use it but as a frequent colorer I got sick of the splintering and breaking when sharpening the other color pencil brands and having to press hard just to get a decent amount of color. For the quality the prices are decent but for…

reviews.name: Tumblyrumm
reviews.title: I enjoy using them
reviews.body: I really do like these. They do erase you two. Have to press a little harder if you want. Vivid colors. Sharpening is easy. Colors are nice. There is no drying time planned ability. Not bad.

reviews.name: James & Gabrielle
reviews.title: Quality Product, Kid Tested!
reviews.body: We bought these colored pencils for our nieces and nephews, who are all still very young, and whenever they come over to visit, there’s always some kind of art project or coloring activity happening at the house. Because of that, durability really matters for us. It’s also been many years since I’ve personally been in a school setting using products like this, so I honestly didn’t know what to…

reviews.name: Michael W. Floyd
reviews.title: 5 Star
reviews.body: These Crayola Colored Pencils (36ct) are fantastic! The colors are vibrant and smooth, and the pencils are pre-sharpened, so my grandkids could start coloring right away. They love using them for their coloring books and art projects, and I love that they’re high-quality and safe. Perfect for both kids and adults who enjoy arts & crafts. A great gift that brings hours of creativity and fun!
